title: Neo Things
description: A Vanilla-like mod pack for exploring the true meaning of Minecraft.
body:
![Main Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nQbbWPc7/images/cb1f47c65ca66a97bec8e8ff5a06ef3cf3cad005.png)

**✅Discover a Completely Transformed World:** Explore diverse and breathtaking biomes with Oh The Biomes We've Gone, uncover hidden treasures in Dungeons and Taverns, and experience the dynamic terrain of Tectonic for a fresh, immersive world.

**✅Performance Optimized with Shader Support:** Enjoy smooth gameplay with shader support specifically tailored for graphics cards, ensuring high-quality visuals and performance.

**✅Enhanced Quality of Life Features:** Packed with numerous QoL improvements to streamline your adventure, making building, crafting, and exploration more intuitive and enjoyable.

**✅Expanded Create Experience with Addons:** Dive deeper into the Create mod with custom addons and new mechanics, offering endless opportunities for complex engineering and automation.

**✅Massive Mod Collection:** Over 250 carefully selected mods to enhance every aspect of your gameplay, from exploration and combat to building and technology.
